testsuite.name: com.psp.retrofit.AlumnosDataRepositoryTest

testcase.name: deleteAlumno should return true if alumno is deleted successfully
test getAlumnoById should return alumno with given id
getAlumnoByCurso should return a list of alumnos with given curso
getAlumnoByNombre should return a list of alumnos with given curso
addAlumno should return the added alumno
